hero_sub: Professional hair, nail and skin treatments for women in Lancaster

services.title: Deep cleanse facial
services.body: Exfoliation followed by hydration to refresh skin

services.title: Eyebrow shaping and tint
services.body: Shape brows, apply tint, and finish with a lash lift

services.title: Classic manicure
services.body: Cuticle care, nail shaping, and gel polish application

about: Iram's Beauty Lounge ( Women Only) is a women-only beauty lounge in Lancaster with a 5.0 Google rating from 46 reviews. Clients book by email at irambeautylounge@gmail.com for beauty treatments in a private setting

faq.q: What area does Iram's Beauty Lounge serve?
faq.a: We provide beauty treatments for clients in Lancaster and the surrounding neighbourhoods

faq.q: How can I book an appointment at Iram's Beauty Lounge?
faq.a: Send your booking request to irambeautylounge@gmail.com; we will reply to confirm your slot

faq.q: What should I expect during my visit to Iram's Beauty Lounge?
faq.a: You will receive a private, women‑only beauty session where our therapist discusses your needs, performs the agreed treatment, and advises on aftercare
